name: proximap-monorepo
description: Monorepo for proximap — a geospatial toolkit for places, proximity, and amenities.
author: Ameya Borkar <ameyaborkar17@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build -w @proximap/core && npm run build -w @proximap/cli && npm run build -w @proximap/mcp
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run test
